channel.title: toknerdytome
channel.description: Kalpana Pot I f*cking love space 🔭 I also act, write, and cohost a science podcast Book, podcast, and more ⬇️

item.title: I was invited for the season two premiere of Apple TVs show, Sug...
item.description:
I was invited for the season two premiere of Apple TVs show, Sugar starring Colin Farrell. I was a fan of season 1 and love the genre bending of noir detective style with sci-fi, sprinkled with a bit of GTA. Anyway, I actually recommend it!
#sugar @Apple TV #scifi #scifishows #hollywood
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED
